summary: Completed iteration 6 testing for Steam Game Library app. All 18 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend tests pass. New features tested: Rules page with 10 guidelines, Discover Trending Games tab (Steam Charts API), Moderation log and appeals (staff-only), Collection pictures (auth required), Profile steam_id fallback, Drag & drop Steam links (in code).
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/rules returns exactly 10 community guidelines with title/description
BACKEND: GET /api/discover/trending returns array of trending games with app_id, name, header_image
BACKEND: Trending game structure includes app_id (int), name, header_image, price
BACKEND: GET /api/modlog returns 403 for unauthenticated users (staff access required)
BACKEND: GET /api/modlog returns 403 with invalid token (staff access required)
BACKEND: POST /api/appeals returns 401 for unauthenticated users
BACKEND: GET /api/appeals/my returns 401 for unauthenticated users
BACKEND: GET /api/appeals/all returns 403 for non-staff users
BACKEND: POST /api/appeals/{id}/review returns 403 for non-staff users
BACKEND: POST /api/collections/{id}/picture returns 401/422 for unauthenticated users
BACKEND: Collection picture upload validates file type
BACKEND: GET /api/profile/{nonexistent_user} returns 404
BACKEND: Profile endpoint supports steam_id fallback lookup
BACKEND: POST /api/games/from-url returns 401 for unauthenticated users
BACKEND: GET /api/health returns ok with steam_key_configured=true
BACKEND: GET /api/categories returns 30+ categories
BACKEND: GET /api/discover/collections is public
BACKEND: GET /api/discover/users is public
FRONTEND: Navbar shows Gamepad2 icon next to 'Game Library' text
FRONTEND: Navbar shows Library, Discover, Users, Rules links (all visible)
FRONTEND: Rules page (/rules) displays all 10 community guidelines with warning banner
FRONTEND: Discover page defaults to 'Trending Games' tab (active state)
FRONTEND: Discover page shows 12 trending Steam games with images and prices
FRONTEND: Game Library page has drag & drop handler built in (onDrop, onDragOver, onDragLeave)
FRONTEND: Collections page has picture upload in create/edit dialog (data-testid='collection-picture-upload')
FRONTEND: Moderation link visible in navbar for staff users only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 features all working. Rules page: GET /api/rules returns 10 rules, /rules route shows Community Rules with warning banner. Trending games: GET /api/discover/trending fetches from Steam Charts API (~10s response time), Discover page defaults to Trending Games tab. Moderation: GET /api/modlog and GET /api/appeals/all require staff role, POST /api/appeals requires auth and banned status, POST /api/appeals/{id}/review with action=approve|deny for staff. Collection pictures: POST /api/collections/{id}/picture with multipart upload, UI has picture upload in dialog. Profile fallback: GET /api/profile/{user_id} also tries steam_id lookup, self-view allowed when banned. Drag & drop: POST /api/games/from-url endpoint, GameLibrary has onDrop handler for Steam links. All features require Steam OAuth for authenticated testing.
notes: Trending games API is slow (fetches details for 12 games from Steam API sequentially) but works correctly. Collection picture upload and appeals system require authenticated testing. The drag & drop feature activates on drag events and shows an overlay.
